source: Aggregated from trade-press RSS (gCaptain, Splash247, Maritime Executive, Hellenic Shipping News, OilPrice)

outages.headline: PBF Energy Announces First Quarter 2026 Results, Declares Dividend of $0.275 per Share and Update on Restart of Martinez Refinery
outages.summary: First quarter income from operations of $299.6 million (excluding special items, first quarter loss from operations of $108.4 million, including a $208.8 million mark-to-market derivative loss) Martinez Refinery restart progressing with full planned rates expected in early May Declared...
